entities.name: RICE
entities.description: A staple cereal grain targeted for biofortification with zinc and folates

entities.name: WHEAT
entities.description: A staple cereal grain targeted for biofortification with zinc, provitamin A, and folates

entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: A staple cereal grain targeted for biofortification with provitamin A and carotenoids

entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A staple cereal grain targeted for biofortification with iron and zinc

entities.name: MICRONUTRIENT DEFICIENCIES
entities.description: A global health condition affecting two billion people due to lack of essential minerals and vitamins

entities.name: ZINC
entities.description: An essential micronutrient targeted for improvement in rice, wheat, and pearl millet

entities.name: PROVITAMIN A
entities.description: A micronutrient targeted for improvement in maize and wheat

entities.name: IRON
entities.description: An essential micronutrient targeted for improvement in pearl millet

entities.name: CAROTENOIDS
entities.description: Nutrients targeted for improvement in maize

entities.name: FOLATES
entities.description: Nutrients targeted for improvement in rice and wheat

entities.name: BIOFORTIFICATION
entities.description: A sustainable breeding approach to enrich staple cereals with essential micronutrients

entities.name: GENOMICS-ASSISTED BREEDING
entities.description: A breeding strategy integrating genomic tools to improve grain nutrition

entities.name: QTL IDENTIFICATION
entities.description: A method used to identify quantitative trait loci associated with carotenoids and folates

entities.name: GENE INTROGRESSIONS
entities.description: A method used to incorporate specific genes into crop varieties to improve nutrition

entities.name: DEVELOPING COUNTRIES
entities.description: Geographic regions where cereal production has increased but malnutrition persists

entities.name: MICRONUTRIENT MALNUTRITION
entities.description: A condition that genomics-assisted breeding in staple crops aims to alleviate

entities.name: STAPLE CEREAL GRAINS
entities.description: Crops that provide a significant portion of daily calories in human diets
